conversation_metadata.mismatch_test_note: Current scorer is expected to miss AI-literacy need because it has no ai_literacy_level dimension.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: What are you hoping to do today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: they told me AI can help but I don't know what to ask. can you just do it?

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: I can help, but I need one small starting point. Is this for work, school, family, or something else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: for work maybe. I sell food sometimes but not like a company. I need words that sound serious.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Okay. I can help draft words. Who are the words for — a customer, a supplier, or someone else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: customer. they ask why price is higher. I don't know if AI will make it sound fake.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: We can make it sound like you. I can give you a draft and explain what to change so it does not sound fake.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: ok but don't make it too fancy. I need to understand it too.
